name: Eggs Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and cook until tender.
3. Add spinach and toss until mixed with the onions.
4. Transfer mixture to a baking dish.
5. Slip eggs into the hollows made in the mixture.
6. Cover with Mornay sauce.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or until eggs are set.
